hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite non-existent or fabricated arXiv papers with future dates (2025-2026), such as FAEDKV (arXiv:2507.20030, 2025), KVzip (arXiv:2505.23416, 2025), KVComp (arXiv:2509.00579, 2025), xKV (arXiv:2503.18893, 2025), R-KV (arXiv:2505.24133, 2025), and KVzap (arXiv:2601.07891, 2026). These cannot be verified and appear invented.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: [1] FAEDKV arXiv:2507.20030, [2] KVzip arXiv:2505.23416, [3] KVComp arXiv:2509.00579, [5] xKV arXiv:2503.18893, [8] R-KV arXiv:2505.24133, [9] KVzap arXiv:2601.07891

hallucinations.description: Experimental results are fabricated: all methods report identical perplexity (206,586) and exact match (83.3%) despite vastly different compression strategies. Ablation studies also show identical metrics across configurations. Code implements synthetic data and evaluation but does not produce or support these exact reported outcomes.
hallucinations.evidence: Table 2: All rows share perplexity=206,586 and Exact Match=83.3%; Table 3: All prototype counts yield identical perplexity=217,257 and Exact Match=85.0%; Figures 2-5 and results text claim consistent performance across methods.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: nonexistent citations and faked experimental results with implausible identical metrics. Severity is high due to fabricated data and references.
